pi_items.source: Matches OUTPUT_PATH in export_result.sh and the task description.
Matches DATASET_DEST in setup_task.sh which copies the file to this location.
Verified against the verifier.py script and prompt. The agent must rename the numerical level '1' to 'Placebo' and set it as the reference.
Verified against verifier.py programmatic check for 'contrastType':'simple' and the task description.

Inspection of the source dataset (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/master/Resources/Data%20Sets/Data%20Library/3.%20ANOVA/Viagra.csv) confirms the column name is lowercase 'libido'.

Inspection of the source dataset (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/master/Resources/Data%20Sets/Data%20Library/3.%20ANOVA/Viagra.csv) confirms the column name is lowercase 'dose'.

privileged_info_summary: The target JASP project file is expected at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra_Contrasts.jasp. The input dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv. The task requires a 'simple' contrast against the reference level 'Placebo'. The agent must manually rename the dataset's numerical group '1' to 'Placebo' to succeed. The actual variable names in the CSV dataset are lowercase 'libido' and 'dose', contradicting the capitalized names 'Libido' and 'Dose' claimed in the metadata.
